step_rationale: Cytochrome P450 driving oxidative stress and lipid oxidation in atherogenesis.
mechanism: CYP1B1 catalyzes oxidative metabolism and lipid peroxidation amplifying atherosclerotic inflammation and lesion progression.

references.title: Early diagnostic biomarkers for acute myocardial infarction unveiled by metabolomics, Mendelian randomization, and machine learning.
Integrative transcriptomic analysis identifies an oxidative stress-associated diagnostic signature for myocardial infarction.
